checks.description: Session timeout is configured and no greater than 15 minutes
Idle logout enforcement flag is on

description: Compiled from RIA briefing 2026-14012, remediation action A2. The timeout value must be present, within bound, and idle logout enforcement must be switched on: a configured-but-unenforced timeout does not satisfy the control.
title: Provider portal enforces an idle session timeout of 15 minutes or less
